parameters.url: =https://api.linkedin.com/v2/organizationalEntityShareStatistics?q=organizationalEntity&organizationalEntity={{ $('LinkedIn - Get Organization ID').item.json.id }}&timeIntervals.timeGranularityType=DAY&timeIntervals.timeRange.start={{ $('Calculate Date Range').item.json.startDateUnix }}000&timeIntervals.timeRange.end={{ $('Calculate Date Range').item.json.endDateUnix }}000

parameters.content:
## 📊 Weekly Social Media Analytics

This workflow automatically collects and reports social media analytics every Monday at 8:00 AM.

**Features:**
- Twitter API v2 integration
- LinkedIn Analytics
- Automatic date range calculation
- Error handling for each platform
- HTML email report with visual metrics
